column3:
From the ticket Description

For Airline IATA code 8Y there are 2 records in the DIM_CUSTOMER_TRAFFIC table, the expectation is that the previous record should be expired.
Additionally some logic was deployed in 2025 where the display_name would be derived from the customer_name, this no longer appears to be working either as per the screenshot below

[cid:ddb5a55b-ffd7-486b-a5f1-44db8ef53759]

Display name has also not been populated for these IATA/ICAO codes;
8R/AIA
A2/AWG
HH/QNT
